hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'google-services\.json|local\.properties|\.keystore'; then echo 'BLOCKED: sensitive file' >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q 'FATAL EXCEPTION\|Process.*has died\|CRASH'; then echo '[Tracey] Crash detected! Pull dump: adb pull /data/data/com.portfolio.nutrisport.debug/files/tracey/ ./tracey-dumps/'; fi
